description: Baby Minnie Mouse Sleepsuit and Headband. Your little mouse will look simply adorable dressed in this Minnie Mouse sleep suit. This onesie resembles Minnie's iconic outfit: red with white polka dots, yellow feet, black sleeves and a matching headband with a cute bow to complete the Minnie look.
